# Languages

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by .github/scripts/gen_language_docs.py - DO NOT EDIT.

Per-language reference: the runners and versions each example exercises, and the setup action json2vars-setter drives. Supported versions are kept in sync with the matrix JSON and the dynamic-update version cache - these pages are generated, not hand-written.

| --- | --- | --- |
